short_description: Facilitates bank loans between ₹10 Lakh to ₹1 Crore for SC/ST and women entrepreneurs to set up greenfield enterprises.
detailed_description: Stand Up India Scheme was launched to promote entrepreneurship among women and SC/ST categories. The scheme facilitates bank loans between ₹10 lakh and ₹1 crore to at least one Scheduled Caste (SC) or Scheduled Tribe (ST) borrower and at least one woman borrower per bank branch for setting up a greenfield enterprise in manufacturing, services or trading sector. The scheme also provides handholding support through Stand Up Connect Centers and convergence with other government schemes.
key_benefits: Composite loan between ₹10 lakh to ₹1 crore for greenfield enterprises
Covers both term loan and working capital requirements
Margin money requirement reduced to 15% (25% for general category)
Handholding support through Stand Up Connect Centers
Convergence with other government schemes like PMEGP, Mudra
other_conditions: Loan is for greenfield enterprise only (new enterprise, not existing)
Enterprise should be in manufacturing, services or trading sector
Borrower should not be in default to any bank/financial institution
At least one SC/ST and one woman borrower per bank branch

REQUIRED_DOCUMENTS.description: Detailed project report with financial projections
For SC/ST applicants - issued by competent authority
For collateral if required by bank
Proposed business registration documents or plan

application_steps_online: Visit Stand Up India portal at www.standupmitra.in
Register as new user with valid email and mobile number
Fill the application form with personal and business details
Upload required documents including business plan
Application will be forwarded to nearest bank branch
Bank will contact you for further processing and loan sanction
application_steps_offline: Visit nearest bank branch (preferably where you have account)
Request for Stand Up India loan application form
Prepare detailed business plan with help of Stand Up Connect Center if needed
Fill application form completely with accurate information
Attach all required documents including caste certificate (for SC/ST)
Submit application to bank along with business plan
Attend bank interview and provide additional information if required
Upon approval, complete loan documentation and receive funds

submission_locations.working_days: Monday to Friday (Saturday for some banks)
submission_locations.notes: Stand Up Connect Centers also provide handholding support for application preparation

validity: Loan repayment period up to 7 years
processing_time: 30 to 60 days depending on bank and documentation

faq.question: Can I apply if I already have an existing business?
faq.answer: No, Stand Up India is only for greenfield enterprises (new businesses). Existing businesses are not eligible.

faq.question: What is the interest rate?
faq.answer: Interest rate is lowest applicable rate of the bank for that category plus 3% tenure premium. Rate varies by bank.

faq.question: Is collateral required?
faq.answer: For loans up to ₹25 lakh, no collateral is required. For higher amounts, bank may ask for collateral.

faq.question: Can general category women apply?
faq.answer: Yes, all women irrespective of caste can apply under Stand Up India.

common_rejection_reasons: Applicant is defaulter in other loans
tips_for_successful_application: Prepare comprehensive and realistic business plan
Get business plan reviewed by Stand Up Connect Center
Ensure all documents are complete and valid
Have clear understanding of your business model
Arrange for margin money (15% of project cost)
Choose viable business with good market potential
